data.title: AI is shaping Asia-Pacific's digital payments & e-commerce market. Report analyzes GenAI's impact, adoption, and challenges.
data.description: A report titled "AI in Asia-Pacific's Digital Payments and E-Commerce Market 2025: Adoption, Competitiveness, and Governance" has been newly included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI), specifically Generative AI (GenAI), on the digital payments and e-commerce sectors in the Asia-Pacific region. It focuses on the increasing adoption of AI, shifts in consumer behavior, and the challenges related to governance, workforce, and infrastructure. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into the ongoing developments in digital payments and online retail in Asia-Pacific.

data.title: Firm urges Eagle Pharmaceuticals, Inc. shareholders to discuss rights as officers are being investigated. Contact firm now.

The firm is currently looking into potential actions to be taken against specific officers and directors of Eagle Pharmaceuticals, Inc. This investigation by Halper Sadeh LLC concerns important matters related to the company and can have significant implications for investors.

data.title: Generational Group facilitates sale of Capital Networks Limited to Univerus Media Inc on Dec 10, 2025.-Based in Toronto, offers digital signage solutions globally.
data.description: In Dallas, Generational Group, a prominent mergers and acquisitions advisory firm, has successfully facilitated the sale of Capital Networks Limited to Univerus Media Inc., a division of Univerus Software Inc. This acquisition was finalized on December 10, 2025. Based in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, Capital Networks Limited is a well-established digital signage software company providing communication and content management solutions to organizations globally.
